title: Samsung cuts 739 New Jersey jobs as its US headquarters heads for Texas
summary: Reporting around the move points to roughly 100 more roles going at Samsung’s Plano, Texas campus and about 179 at Samsung SDS America in Ridgefield Park, the town the company only recently left behind.
